title: Wings of Freedom
description: A minecraft mod based on "Attack on Titan"
body:
"On that day, mankind received a grim reminder. We lived in fear of the Titans and were disgraced to live in these cages we called walls."

This mod is inspired by the famous anime/manga "Attack on Titan" or "Shingeki no Kyojin".
Explore a world of fear and death where your daily mining business can be interrupted by titans turning you into their next meal.
Will you look for shelter, or take the fight to them? Create iconic weapons, find mysterious locations and solve the mystery of the titans!
